final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: infographic-diagram
Asset type: technical exploded-view diagram, educational reference
Primary request: detailed exploded-view breakdown of a Sony A7 camera with all internal components labeled by name
Scene/backdrop: clean neutral background (light gray or white), minimal distractions to emphasize technical details
Subject: Sony A7 full-frame mirrorless camera, fully disassembled into individual components (sensor, shutter mechanism, IBIS unit, processor board, battery compartment, lens mount, dials, buttons, LCD screen, EVF, circuit boards, screws, connectors)
Style/medium: technical illustration, isometric exploded view, precise line art with realistic component rendering
Composition/framing: centered exploded view with components arranged in floating layers showing assembly order, clear spacing between parts
Lighting/mood: even studio lighting, soft shadows beneath each component for depth, clinical and informative atmosphere
Color palette: metallic grays, blacks, silver accents for camera body; colored labels with leader lines; subtle blue/green for circuit boards
Materials/textures: brushed aluminum, matte black plastic, glass elements, copper circuitry, rubber grips, precision mechanical parts
Text (verbatim): "Sony A7"
Constraints: must show all major internal components with clear leader lines connecting to labels; maintain accurate proportions and recognizable Sony A7 form factor
Avoid: cluttered overlapping parts, illegible tiny text, artistic flourishes, incorrect component shapes, missing key internal elements
